name: nanostack-telemetry-worker
description: nanostack telemetry ingestion Worker. Privacy-strict: HTTPS-only, schema-whitelisted, never stores raw IP.
//overrides: Transitive security pins. ws < 8.20.1 has a moderate advisory (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx, uninitialized memory disclosure) and esbuild < 0.28.1 has a high advisory (GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr, missing binary integrity verification enabling RCE via NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY). Both reach us transitively via wrangler (ws via miniflare; esbuild directly). Pin the patched lines here rather than bumping wrangler, because wrangler's later lines add a third-party native-binary dependency we do not want in a privacy-strict Worker. Revisit each when wrangler ships the patched line upstream. esbuild is build-time only (wrangler bundling), never shipped to the Worker runtime.
